CreateCapability.description: Grants permission to create a capability

CreatePartnership.description: Grants permission to create a partnership

CreateProfile.description: Grants permission to create a profile

CreateStarterMappingTemplate.description: Grants permission to generate a starter JSONATA/XSLT template

CreateTransformer.description: Grants permission to create a transformer

DeleteCapability.description: Grants permission to delete a capability

DeletePartnership.description: Grants permission to delete an partnership

DeleteProfile.description: Grants permission to delete a profile

DeleteTransformer.description: Grants permission to delete a transformer

GenerateMapping.description: Grants permission to generate a starter JSONATA/XSLT mapping template from Amazon Bedrock

GetCapability.description: Grants permission to get a capability

GetPartnership.description: Grants permission to get a partnership

GetProfile.description: Grants permission to get a profile

GetTransformer.description: Grants permission to get a transformer

GetTransformerJob.description: Grants permission to get a transformer job

ListCapabilities.description: Grants permission to list all capabilities

ListPartnerships.description: Grants permission to list all partnerships

ListProfiles.description: Grants permission to list all profiles

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to list tags for a B2Bi resource

ListTransformers.description: Grants permission to list all transformers

StartTransformerJob.description: Grants permission to transformer a document

TagResource.description: Grants permission to tag a B2Bi resource

TestConversion.description: Grants permission to convert a JSON/XML to an edi document

TestMapping.description: Grants permission to map a sample file

TestParsing.description: Grants permission to parse an edi document

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to untag a B2Bi resource

UpdateCapability.description: Grants permission to update a capability

UpdatePartnership.description: Grants permission to update a partnership

UpdateProfile.description: Grants permission to update a profile

UpdateTransformer.description: Grants permission to update a transformer

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags that are passed in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags associated with the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by the tag keys that are passed in the request
